name: CONTRACT-BUG-21
title: check-sentinel.py walks .sh files but spec invariant 11 says no .sh files exist
description: scripts/enforcement/check-sentinel.py line 49 walks both .sh and .py files. Per spec invariant 11, no .sh files exist. The .sh branch is dead code.
